title: chamaecrista rufa
intro: Chamaecrista rufa, also known as partridge pea or sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chamaecrista rufa are said to include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and supporting digestive health. Chamaecrista rufa can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
